translations.language.apply_live.note: Restart visible SevenOS surfaces so new windows use the active language.
translations.language.needs_restart: Some open apps need to be reopened to fully switch language.
translations.settings.apply_now.note: Restart SevenOS shell surfaces after language, theme or region changes.
translations.settings.region_updated: Region formats updated. New SevenOS windows will use the refreshed contract.
translations.settings.general.hero.title: Essential preferences, without terminal work
translations.settings.general.hero.note: Change language, region formats, default apps and SevenOS identity from one calm place. Some system-level changes still apply to new windows first.
translations.settings.default_reader.note: Use Seven Reader for PDF, EPUB and study documents.
translations.settings.default_media.note: Choose the player used for common audio and video files.
translations.settings.monitor_resolution.note: Choose a monitor resolution such as 1920x1080, then apply it through the SevenOS display engine.
translations.settings.monitor_applied: Monitor resolution applied. SevenOS is refreshing the display engine.
translations.settings.profiles.hero.title: Mini OS profiles are independent
translations.settings.profiles.hero.note: Each profile owns its Kernel, Runtime, Experience and Intelligence layers. Profiles can collaborate by capability, but none should silently pollute another.
translations.settings.profile_center.note: Open the full profile dashboard with composition, services and runtime state.
translations.settings.composition_layer.note: Inspect active mini OS, borrowed capabilities and anti-pollution policy.
translations.settings.profile_aliases.note: Clean retired profile names like Horizon from local SevenOS state.
translations.settings.profile.equinox.note: Balanced daily mini OS. Neutral base, no specialized stack forced by default.
translations.settings.profile.baobab.note: African cultural mini OS. Digital village, heritage, languages, oral stories, sound, map, fashion, food, wisdom and offline memory.
translations.settings.profile.forge.note: DevOps mini OS for code, SDKs, local services, containers, builds, deployments and logs.
translations.settings.profile.shield.note: Cybersecurity mini OS for authorized audit, forensics, sandboxing and reports.
translations.settings.profile.studio.note: Creator mini OS for logos, design, video, audio, 3D, capture and assets.
translations.settings.profile.windows.note: Windows Bridge mini OS for full desktop sessions, app compatibility and shared workspaces.
translations.settings.profile.pulse.note: Linux gaming mini OS for Proton, low latency, frame pacing, controllers and overlays.
translations.settings.default_apps.subtitle: Choose the apps SevenOS uses for files, links, documents, media and archives.
translations.settings.default_apps.note: Choose browser, files, terminal, Reader, media, image, mail and archive defaults in a dedicated page.
translations.settings.defaults.hero.title: Open the right app every time
translations.settings.defaults.hero.note: SevenOS keeps common file types and links predictable for normal users while still allowing advanced profile workflows.
translations.settings.default_images.note: Choose the app used to inspect images without changing wallpaper by accident.
translations.settings.default_mail.note: Choose the app used for mail links.
translations.settings.default_archives.note: Choose the archive manager for compressed files.
translations.settings.privacy.subtitle: Local data, permissions, notifications and SevenAI privacy controls.
translations.settings.privacy.note: Review notifications, local SevenAI data and app permissions.
translations.settings.privacy.hero.title: Local-first by default
translations.settings.privacy.hero.note: SevenOS should expose what it stores, what it indexes and which surfaces can use sensitive devices.
translations.settings.notifications.note: Open notification history, Do Not Disturb and restore controls.
translations.settings.local_ai_data.note: Inspect the local-only AI provider, knowledge and privacy posture.
translations.settings.microphone_camera.note: Open audio devices and app permission surfaces where available.
translations.settings.spotlight_history.note: Open Spotlight history and clear recent command traces if needed.
translations.settings.backup_restore.subtitle: Export SevenOS state, inspect restore plans and protect user configuration.
translations.settings.backup_restore.note: Protect SevenOS configuration before deeper changes.
translations.settings.backup.hero.title: Protect changes before they become permanent
translations.settings.backup.hero.note: SevenOS can export state, show restore plans and create migration backups before major edits.
translations.settings.export_state.note: Create a readable snapshot of SevenOS state for support or migration.
translations.settings.restore_plan.note: Inspect protected paths and restore metadata before changing the system.
translations.settings.migration_backup.note: Create a protected backup of SevenOS user configuration.
translations.settings.sevencloud.note: Inspect local-first backup and restore readiness.
translations.settings.shortcuts.subtitle: Open, inspect and repair SevenOS keyboard shortcuts.
translations.settings.shortcuts.note: Open the full keyboard shortcut and command reference.
translations.settings.shortcuts.hero.title: Everything has a visible path
translations.settings.shortcuts.hero.note: SevenOS keeps shortcuts documented in Help while the Lua layer keeps bindings generated and auditable.
translations.settings.help_center.note: Open the full Super+H documentation with commands and mini OS usage.
translations.settings.shortcut_audit.note: Validate generated SevenOS keybindings and fallback rules.
translations.settings.regenerate_shortcuts.note: Rebuild the generated SevenOS keybinding layer and refresh the window system.
translations.settings.monitor_restore: Previous monitor configuration restored when a backup exists.
translations.settings.compare_profiles.note: Compare Equinox, Forge, Studio and Shield capabilities before switching.
translations.settings.profile_runtime.note: Show what services, resources and UI behavior the active mini OS intends to use.

text.Language applied to live SevenOS surface: Language applied to live SevenOS surfaces.
text.Some open apps need to be reopened to fu: Some open apps need to be reopened to fully switch language.
text.Search current folder. Prefix with / for: Search current folder. Prefix with / for global search or # for tags.
text.Sort files: A-Z, Date, Size, Type: Sort files: A-Z, Date, Size, Type
text.No matching books found.\nPut PDF, EPUB,:
No matching books found.
Put PDF, EPUB, Markdown or CBZ files in Books, Documents or Downloads.
text.Already installed. Launch it directly fr: Already installed. Launch it directly from here, Launchpad or Spotlight.
text.Installed technical component. It does n: Installed technical component. It does not expose a normal graphical launcher.
